title: Example: Slight increase in exit flow_deterioration weight

why.observation: Exits with high flow_deterioration component show higher avg_profit_giveback; slight weight increase may reduce giveback.

falsification_criteria: win_rate drops by more than 2% over 7 days paper
Regression guards fail (attribution invariant or exit quality)
rollback: Remove config/tuning/active.json overlay or set GOVERNED_TUNING_CONFIG to baseline; re-run guards.
